EffectDLL.name: Blur&Sharpen - Box Blur
EffectDLL.Shader:
<PixelShader code="
          sampler2D Tex : register(s0);
          float Amount : register(c0);
          float2 TexelSize : register(c1);
          float4 main(float2 uv : TEXCOORD) : COLOR {
            float4 color = float4(0,0,0,0);
            int r = (int)(Amount * 0.5);
            float total = 0.0;
            for (int x = -r; x <= r; x++) {
              for (int y = -r; y <= r; y++) {
                color += tex2D(Tex, uv + float2(x, y) * TexelSize);
                total += 1.0;
              }
            }
            return color / total;
          }
        "/>

EffectDLL.name: Blur&Sharpen - Gauss Blur
EffectDLL.Shader:
<PixelShader code="
          sampler2D Tex : register(s0);
          float Radius : register(c0);
          float Sigma : register(c1);
          float2 TexelSize : register(c2);
          float gaussian(float x, float sigma) {
            return exp(-(x*x) / (2.0*sigma*sigma));
          }
          float4 main(float2 uv : TEXCOORD) : COLOR {
            float4 color = float4(0,0,0,0);
            float total = 0.0;
            int r = (int)Radius;
            for (int x = -r; x <= r; x++) {
              for (int y = -r; y <= r; y++) {
                float w = gaussian(length(float2(x, y)), Sigma);
                color += tex2D(Tex, uv + float2(x, y) * TexelSize) * w;
                total += w;
              }
            }
            return color / total;
          }
        "/>

EffectDLL.name: Blur&Sharpen - Unsharp Mask
EffectDLL.Shader:
<PixelShader code="
          sampler2D Tex : register(s0);
          float Radius : register(c0);
          float Amount : register(c1);
          float Threshold : register(c2);
          float2 TexelSize : register(c3);
          float4 main(float2 uv : TEXCOORD) : COLOR {
            float4 orig = tex2D(Tex, uv);
            float4 blur = float4(0,0,0,0);
            int r = (int)Radius;
            float total = 0.0;
            for (int x = -r; x <= r; x++) {
              for (int y = -r; y <= r; y++) {
                float w = 1.0;
                blur += tex2D(Tex, uv + float2(x, y) * TexelSize) * w;
                total += w;
              }
            }
            blur /= total;
            float4 diff = orig - blur;
            float mag = length(diff.rgb);
            if (mag > Threshold)
              return orig + diff * Amount;
            return orig;
          }
        "/>

EffectDLL.name: Blur&Sharpen - Motion Blur
EffectDLL.Shader:
<PixelShader code="
          sampler2D Tex : register(s0);
          float Angle : register(c0);
          float Distance : register(c1);
          float2 TexelSize : register(c2);
          float4 main(float2 uv : TEXCOORD) : COLOR {
            float rad = Angle * 3.14159265 / 180.0;
            float2 dir = float2(cos(rad), sin(rad)) * TexelSize * Distance;
            float4 color = float4(0,0,0,0);
            int steps = (int)Distance;
            for (int i = 0; i < steps; i++) {
              float t = (float)i / (float)steps;
              color += tex2D(Tex, uv + dir * t);
            }
            return color / (float)steps;
          }
        "/>

EffectDLL.name: CreativEase - HSL Adjust
EffectDLL.Shader:
<PixelShader code="
          sampler2D Tex : register(s0);
          float Hue : register(c0);
          float Saturation : register(c1);
          float Lightness : register(c2);
          float3 rgb2hsl(float3 c) {
            float maxC = max(c.r, max(c.g, c.b));
            float minC = min(c.r, min(c.g, c.b));
            float l = (maxC + minC) * 0.5;
            float d = maxC - minC;
            float s = (l > 0.5) ? d / (2.0 - maxC - minC) : d / (maxC + minC);
            float h = 0.0;
            if (d > 0.0) {
              if (maxC == c.r) h = (c.g - c.b) / d + (c.g < c.b ? 6.0 : 0.0);
              else if (maxC == c.g) h = (c.b - c.r) / d + 2.0;
              else h = (c.r - c.g) / d + 4.0;
              h /= 6.0;
            }
            return float3(h, s, l);
          }
          float hue2rgb(float p, float q, float t) {
            if (t < 0.0) t += 1.0;
            if (t > 1.0) t -= 1.0;
            if (t < 1.0/6.0) return p + (q - p) * 6.0 * t;
            if (t < 0.5) return q;
            if (t < 2.0/3.0) return p + (q - p) * (2.0/3.0 - t) * 6.0;
            return p;
          }
          float3 hsl2rgb(float3 hsl) {
            float h = hsl.x, s = hsl.y, l = hsl.z;
            if (s == 0.0) return float3(l, l, l);
            float q = (l < 0.5) ? l * (1.0 + s) : l + s - l * s;
            float p = 2.0 * l - q;
            return float3(hue2rgb(p,q,h+1.0/3.0), hue2rgb(p,q,h), hue2rgb(p,q,h-1.0/3.0));
          }
          float4 main(float2 uv : TEXCOORD) : COLOR {
            float4 orig = tex2D(Tex, uv);
            float3 hsl = rgb2hsl(orig.rgb);
            hsl.x = frac(hsl.x + Hue / 360.0);
            hsl.y = saturate(hsl.y * Saturation);
            hsl.z = saturate(hsl.z + Lightness);
            return float4(hsl2rgb(hsl), orig.a);
          }
        "/>

EffectDLL.name: DistortMaster - Displace
EffectDLL.Shader:
<PixelShader code="
          sampler2D Tex : register(s0);
          sampler2D DispMap : register(s1);
          float ScaleX : register(c0);
          float ScaleY : register(c1);
          float ChannelX : register(c2);
          float ChannelY : register(c3);
          float4 main(float2 uv : TEXCOORD) : COLOR {
            float4 disp = tex2D(DispMap, uv);
            float dx = (ChannelX < 0.5) ? disp.r : ((ChannelX < 1.5) ? disp.g : disp.b);
            float dy = (ChannelY < 0.5) ? disp.r : ((ChannelY < 1.5) ? disp.g : disp.b);
            float2 nuv = uv + float2((dx - 0.5) * ScaleX, (dy - 0.5) * ScaleY);
            return tex2D(Tex, nuv);
          }
        "/>
